world.description: The leaders "agreed on new steps in security cooperation," Zelensky wrote on Telegram following the talks. Ukraine is ready to support Turkey with "expertise, technology, and experience," and details of the agreements will be finalized in the coming days.

science.title: A 7D model reveals how black holes give birth to remnants before death
science.description: Instead of disappearing completely, black holes may leave tiny remnants that trap information in long-lived vibrations.

science.title: First-Ever Close-Up of Planet-Forming Discs Reveals New Clues About the Birth of Planets Like Earth
science.description: The James Webb Space Telescope has unveiled stunning new images of two planet-forming discs, offering crucial insights into the processes that shape new worlds.

science.title: MIT Researchers Observe Electrons Acting In Four Dimensions Within Novel Crystals
science.description: Researchers at MIT discovered that electrons within novel “moiré crystals” behave as if moving in four dimensions, simulating properties of hypothesized 4D quantum materials. This behavior occurs despite existing within our three-dimensional world.

science.title: With the Einstein Probe Telescope, Scientists Have Just Discovered a New Kind of Star Explosion
science.description: What happens when a massive star collapses? Astronomers may have just witnessed a rare and powerful event never seen before.

science.title: Microbes Found Inside a 183-Million-Year-Old Ichthyosaur Turned Its Bones Into a Stunning 3D Fossil
science.description: A team of scientists has discovered how microbes inside a decaying ichthyosaur helped transform its remains into a breathtaking 3D fossil, rewriting the story of fossilization.

science.title: Fossils from China show complex life evolved millions of years earlier than once thought
science.description: By Mindy Weisberger, CNN (CNN) — Goblet-shaped sea jelly relatives with miniature “arms.” A plump, legless creature resembling a sausage. Long, wormlike animals tipped with flat “holdfast” discs for anchoring to the seafloor. Newfound fossils from a site in southwestern China, preserved in exquisite detail, offer a peek at a time in Earth’s distant past called the Ediacaran (635 million to 542 million years ago). The discovery suggests that comp…

science.title: Venus Might Not Be So Lifeless After All. Scientists Find Molecules That Could Make Life Possible on Its Harsh Surface
science.description: With its scorching heat and suffocating pressure, Venus has been written off as lifeless. But could we have missed something important?

science.title: Artemis II astronauts pass halfway mark to moon in historic mission: NASA
science.description: NASA's Artemis II astronauts are now more than halfway to the moon, marking a major milestone in the first crewed deep-space mission in more than 50 years.

ai.title: Gujarat HC bars AI use in decision
ai.description: According to the high court's AI policy, unveiled on Saturday at a conference of district judiciary judges in Gujarat, AI should be used to improve the speed and quality of justice delivery, rather than as a replacement for judicial reasoning.

ai.title: Gujarat High Court Bans AI in Judicial Decision-Making
ai.description: The Gujarat High Court has prohibited AI's use in decision-making and judicial processes. The policy is designed to enhance justice delivery without compromising judicial independence. AI can assist in administrative tasks, but must be scrutinized and limited to ensure accuracy and integrity in the judiciary.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - Gujarat High Court Bans AI in Judicial Decision-Making
ai.description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

ai.title: Honesty in judiciary not a virtue, but given, says Justice Nath
ai.description: Justice Vikram Nath emphasized the ethical and institutional responsibilities of the judiciary and cautioned against celebrating honesty as a virtue. He acknowledged the evolving role of technology like the potential of AI in justice delivery but cautioned against viewing AI as a substitute for judicial decision making.
